title: manisuris glandulosa
intro: Manisuris glandulosa is a plant species that belongs to the family of Compositae, commonly known as the sunflower family, and is native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Manisuris glandulosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and treat respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments, and can also be dried and used as a tea or added to other herbal remedies.
